summary: Complete audit of the BASED.ipynb Colab notebook identifying the critical random-split problem (Cell 30) and missing VRA section (Cell 74). Provides 6 copy-paste-ready code blocks: (1) coordinate extraction from .geo JSON, (2) spatial block ID assignment at 0.01° grid, (3) GroupKFold replacement for train_test_split, (4-6) full NDRE-modulated VRA prescription pipeline with savings calculation and dual-panel visualization. Includes exact insertion points mapped to existing cell numbers.
